options.title: Options Strategy
options.subtitle: Sell Put Recommendations
options.pageSubtitle: Designed for conservative investors, using high cash ratios to execute Sell Put strategies with low risk.
options.conditionsDetail: VIX 20-35 range · High probability OTM · Target 25-50% profit to close
options.positionDetail: Single trade max 5% of account · Maintain sufficient cash for margin
options.riskDetail: Stop loss if loss exceeds 2x premium · Avoid 2 weeks before earnings
options.scenario1Title: Want to buy stock at target price?
options.scenario1Detail:
Use Sell Put

💰 Collect premium upfront
📉 If stock drops to strike, buy at lower price
📈 If stock rises, premium is free profit
options.scenario1DetailZh:
使用 Sell Put

💰 先收一笔权利金
📉 如果股价跌到行权价，低价买入
📈 如果股价不跌，权利金白赚
options.scenario2Title: Want to sell holdings at higher price?
options.scenario2Detail:
Use Sell Call = Covered Call

💰 Collect premium while holding stock
📈 If stock surges, sell at strike price
📉 If stock doesn't rise, premium is free profit
options.scenario2DetailZh:
使用 Sell Call = Covered Call

💰 持有股票的同时卖出 CALL，收取权利金
📈 如果股价大涨，你以高价卖出（行权价）
📉 如果股价不涨，权利金白赚
options.scenario3Title: Want to protect holdings from drops?
options.scenario3Detail:
Use Protective Put

🛡️ Buy put option as insurance
📉 If stock drops, put profit offsets loss
📈 If stock rises, keep all gains
options.scenario3DetailZh:
使用 Protective Put

🛡️ 买个看跌期权当保险
📉 如果股价大跌，Put 赚钱抵消损失
📈 如果股价不跌，股票盈利全拿
options.simpleRuleDetail: ✅ Want cheap entry → Sell Put | ✅ Have stocks want extra income → Sell Call | ✅ Worried about drops → Protective Put | ⏱️ Option term: Recommend 30-45 DTE
options.noRecordsClick: No options records, click "Record Open" to add
options.noStrategy: No strategy recommendations, please refresh later
options.noOptionPositions: No option positions, go to Holdings → Options to record

tsla.title: TSLA Monitor
tsla.subtitle: More than data - Deep analysis of Tesla's moat, business growth drivers, and long-term holding logic to assist Sell Put decisions.
tsla.moatDesc: Tesla's competitive advantages come from multiple mutually reinforcing flywheels - here are the core reasons supporting long-term hold:
tsla.whySellPutTitle: Why Choose TSLA for Sell Put?
tsla.breakevenDesc: If TSLA is above this price at expiration, option is profitable.
tsla.calcAdvice: Enter parameters and calculator will auto-update
tsla.moatDetail1: FSD Gen 12 breakthrough, outperforming Waymo in tests, widest data moat
tsla.moatDetail2: Self-developed AI chips, 40% lower compute cost, no NVIDIA dependency
tsla.moatDetail3: Megapack储能订单创历史，毛利率超过汽车业务
tsla.moatDetail4: X platform + SpaceX synergy, Musk's personal brand is irreplaceable
tsla.moatDetail5: 4680 battery + gigacasting, manufacturing cost down 15% annually
tsla.moatDetail6: 50k+ Superchargers, opened to other brands, becoming infrastructure
tsla.moatDetail7: Robotaxi deployment 2025, Optimus humanoid robot mass production 2026
tsla.moatDetail8: Tesla's owner repurchase rate is 70%, far exceeding traditional automakers' 30-40%
tsla.moatDetail9: From battery to vehicle to sales, independent control of core segments, gross margin consistently leading
tsla.moatDetail10: Global Supercharger network exceeds 50,000 stalls, a moat difficult for competitors to replicate
tsla.moatDetail11: OTA updates, autonomous driving data loop, making cars more valuable over time
tsla.moatDetail12: Self-developed battery technology reduces cost by 14%, deep supply chain integration
tsla.moatDetail13: Energy storage and automotive business synergy, creating 'energy+transportation' closed loop
tsla.moatDetail14: From Roadster to Model S/3/X/Y to Cybertruck, continuously delivering on promises
tsla.moatData1: World's largest autonomous driving mileage database > 1 billion miles
tsla.moatData2: First Dojo ExaPOD deployed in 2024, compute power > 100 ExaFLOPs
tsla.moatData3: 2024Q3 energy storage deployment 11.1GWh, +75% YoY, gross margin 30%+
tsla.moatData4: Tesla brand recognition consistently #1 in EV segment
tsla.moatData5: Gigacasting reduces body parts by ~300, cost down ~15%
tsla.moatData6: Supercharger network open creates new revenue stream, hard to replicate
tsla.moatData7: Texas Robotaxi pilot Q2 2025, Optimus target mass production end of 2025
tsla.moatData9: Vehicle gross margin 19% vs Toyota 12%, Ford 8%
tsla.moatData11: FSD cumulative mileage 1 billion miles, data leadership
tsla.moatData13: Energy business growing 60% annually, 25% gross margin
tsla.outlookDesc1: Texas/California launch mid-2025, could disrupt mobility market
tsla.outlookDesc2: Megapack standalone valuation could exceed $100B, severely undervalued
tsla.outlookDesc3: North America FSD subscription rate breaks 10%, ARR growing rapidly
tsla.outlookDesc4: Target 1M units production in 2026, disrupting labor market
tsla.outlookDesc5: BYD has surpassed in some price segments and markets, Europe under pressure
tsla.outlookDesc6: Musk's political involvement increases brand polarization, some European user loss
tsla.outlookDesc7: Global Model 3/Y annual capacity exceeded 2M units, still room for growth
tsla.outlookDesc8: Cybertruck reservations exceed 1M units, Texas factory ramping production
tsla.outlookDesc9: FSD V12 adopts end-to-end AI, regulatory breakthrough expected 2024
tsla.outlookDesc10: 4680 battery yield improved to 90%, cost advantage emerging
tsla.outlookDesc11: Energy storage business growing 60% annually with 25% gross margin, becoming second growth curve
tsla.outlookDesc12: Optimus robot small batch production in 2024, potential trillion-dollar market
tsla.sellPutWhy: TSLA has high volatility (IV typically 50-100% range), Sell Put can collect rich premiums. Meanwhile you're bullish on Tesla long-term, willing to buy shares at strike price if assigned, excellent risk/reward ratio. This is optimal strategy premised on 'wanting to buy TSLA at low price'.
tsla.vixTiming: Open when VIX > 20, high implied vol → richer premiums. Wait when VIX < 15
tsla.pullbackTip: Best entry window after TSLA pullback (5-10%), lower cost
tsla.positionSizeTip: Use no more than 30% of total position per trade, avoid excessive cash tie-up
tsla.thetaDecay: 30-45 days is optimal (fastest Theta decay), can close 2 weeks before expiry to lock 80% profit
tsla.bestCondition2: TSLA just pulled back 5-10% from high
tsla.conservativeNote: Large safety margin, suitable for beginners

market.aiCycleDesc: Currently in AI tech revolution installation phase with normal valuation bubbles. NVDA/GOOGL/AMZN long-term logic unchanged.

sectors.amdDesc: Second largest GPU supplier, clear cost-performance advantage
sectors.quantumTitle: Quantum Computing — The Next Paradigm Revolution
sectors.ionqDesc: Only public company using ion trap technology, highest precision
sectors.ionqComment: 5-10 year track, on the eve of quantum supremacy, high risk high return
sectors.spaceTitle: Space Economy — The Next Trillion Market
sectors.spacexDesc: Starship program Starlink global network, NASA's largest supplier
sectors.btcDesc: Digital gold, sovereign asset, institutional inflow post-ETF approval
sectors.ethDesc: Web3 smart contract foundation, staking yield 3-5%
sectors.usdcDesc: USD digitization, core of on-chain dollar hegemony

conservative-core.name: Conservative Core Allocation
conservative-core.description: Focus on US core tech stocks, emphasize long-term holding and cash management, suitable for risk-averse investors. Allocation focused on quality targets like NVDA, GOOGL, with ample cash reserves for volatility.

balanced-growth.name: Balanced Growth Strategy
balanced-growth.description: Balanced allocation of core positions + growth positions, pursuing growth on a stable foundation. Includes cutting-edge tracks like AI infrastructure and cloud computing, while enhancing returns through sell put strategies.

aggressive-tech.name: Tech Aggressive Strategy
aggressive-tech.description: Heavy position in AI and frontier technology, pursuing high returns. Suitable for investors who can withstand larger fluctuations, including high-risk high-return targets like quantum computing and cryptocurrency.

sell-put-income.name: Sell Put Income Strategy
sell-put-income.description: Focus on generating premium income through sell put options strategy, especially suitable for volatile or moderately rising markets. Prioritize highly liquid targets like TSLA, set reasonable strike prices.

crypto-hedge.name: Crypto Asset Allocation
crypto-hedge.description: Include cryptocurrency as part of asset allocation, gain digital gold returns through BTC and ETH. Recommend ETF or small direct allocation, control overall position size.

quantum-future.name: Quantum Computing Future
quantum-future.description: Early layout in quantum computing track, with IONQ as core target. This is a 5-10 year long-term track, suitable for investors who can withstand high volatility and pursue explosive growth.

algo.title: Algorithm Explanation
algo.aboutDesc: This page details all algorithm logic, calculation formulas, and data sources used in this investment system. All algorithms are decision-support tools and do not constitute investment advice.
algo.twoSystemsDesc: The system uses two different scoring algorithms for different scenarios:
algo.healthScoreSimpleDesc: Displayed on overview page, a quick assessment based on cash/position ratio
algo.comprehensiveScoreDesc: Displayed on health page, a comprehensive 6-dimension analysis
algo.scoreNote: Note: The two scores may differ, which is normal as they evaluate from different angles.
algo.algo1ADesc: Lightweight quick assessment focusing on cash and position allocation:
algo.algo1ANote: Use case: Quick health check on the overview page. Simple calculation, fast response.
algo.diversificationDesc: Based on sector dispersion, deductions start when a single sector exceeds 40%
algo.riskExposureDesc: Assesses stock concentration, single stock exceeding 25% is high risk
algo.cashAllocationDesc: Compares with target cash ratio, more deviation means more deductions
algo.trendDesc: Alignment of holdings with long-term trends
algo.sellPutLogicDesc: Based on core Sell Put principles: only sell Puts on stocks with strong moats and long-term bullish outlook.
algo.dteAndWinRate: DTE (Days to Expiry) and Win Rate
algo.highCashDesc: Actual cash ratio exceeds target ratio +15%
algo.vixSpikeDesc: VIX single-day increase exceeds 20% or breaks 30
algo.moatScoringDesc: Evaluates Tesla competitive moat from 7 dimensions:
algo.newsSource: Smart-matched simulated data based on holdings
algo.footer: Algorithms for educational purposes only, not investment advice
algo.formula1AText: Health Score = 100 - |Actual Cash % - Target Cash %| × Penalty Factor
algo.formula1AComment1: // Penalty factor dynamically adjusts based on deviation
algo.formula1BText: Composite Score = Σ(Dimension Score × Dimension Weight)
algo.formula1BComment1: // Each dimension max 100, weights sum to 1
algo.calcExampleLine1: Diversification 85(20%) + Risk 70(20%) + Cash 90(15%) + Profitability 80(15%) + Valuation 75(15%) + Trend 85(15%)
algo.symbolTSLA: EV/Energy/AI Robots — Core holding, top Sell Put pick; IV est. 55%, OTM mult. 1.0×
algo.symbolNVDA: AI compute infrastructure — Extremely wide moat; IV est. 50%, OTM mult. 1.1×
algo.symbolGOOGL: AI/Search/Cloud — Most undervalued AI giant; IV est. 35%, OTM mult. 0.9×
algo.symbolMETA: AI social/ads dual engine — Undervalued; IV est. 38%, OTM mult. 0.9×
algo.symbolIONQ: Quantum computing (high beta) — High risk/reward, small size; IV est. 80%, OTM mult. 1.4×
algo.otmFormula1: Base OTM% = Conservative 15% / Balanced 10% / Aggressive 5% (by profile)
algo.otmFormula2: Actual OTM% = Base OTM% × Symbol OTM Multiplier
algo.otmComment: // Strike rounded down to $5/$2.5/$0.1 precision (by price range)
algo.premiumComment1: // IV = estimated implied vol per symbol (TSLA 0.55, IONQ 0.80, etc.)
algo.premiumComment3: // Cap at 10% of stock price, floor at $0.10
algo.dteConservative: DTE = 45 days, Win Rate 85%, Base OTM 15%
algo.dteBalanced: DTE = 30 days, Win Rate 75%, Base OTM 10%
algo.dteAggressive: DTE = 21 days, Win Rate 65%, Base OTM 5%
algo.vixLow: Low volatility, premium thin — wait for better opportunity
algo.vixNormal: Normal range — execute per standard parameters
algo.vixHigh: Premium rich — Sell Put returns are higher
algo.dataSourceDesc: Stock prices fetched from multiple real-time sources: Stooq first (free, unlimited), fallback to Alpha Vantage. Price warning triggered if sources differ by >10%.
algo.calcExample2Note: Note: Actual fill prices vary with market conditions. This is an estimate for reference only.
algo.tslaAutopilotDesc: FSD technological lead, data accumulation scale
algo.tslaDojoDesc: In-house AI chip capability, compute cost advantage
algo.tslaEnergyDesc: Megapack storage growth, gross margin levels
algo.tslaBrandDesc: Musk personal brand, social media influence
algo.stockPnlFormula1: Floating P&L = (Current Price - Cost Basis) × Shares
algo.stockPnlFormula2: P&L % = (Current Price - Cost Basis) / Cost Basis × 100%
algo.expiredFormula: Realized P&L = Premium × Contracts × 100 shares (full premium collected)
algo.earlyCloseFormula: Sell Put P&L = Premium Collected - Close Cost
algo.earlyCloseComment: // Close Cost = Buyback Price × Contracts × 100 shares
